历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong Agricultural University in Jiangsu Physics Category were approximately 27736, 29714, 39518, 39109, and 39620 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, the rankings continuously shifted backward by about 11782 places, slightly recovered to 39109 in 2024, and then slightly fell back to 39620 in 2025. In the past three years, the overall fluctuation range was 39000-39600, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 39620. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 77 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 80 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 85 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual small-scale expansion. The 2026 enrollment plan is 91 students, an increase of 6 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 7.1%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 45th on the main list, and 47th in 2025, with a stable and slightly rising ranking, placing it in the upper-middle level nationwide. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine and Animal Husbandry were rated A+, and Crop Science, Fisheries, and Food Science and Engineering were rated A, totaling 5 A-level disciplines, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related majors. In 2026 reputation data, no significant negative public opinion incidents were found for this university. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 54th, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate social attention. In recent years, there have been no records of cutoff line drops or crashes, indicating relatively stable application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu Gaokao registrants is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to approximately 358,000 in 2025. Based on recent years' proportions, it is estimated that there are about 380,000 Physics Category examinees, a notable increase from 261,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, relatively close to Jiangsu Province, and is a high-quality university in the central region, with some regional appeal to Jiangsu examinees. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu accounts for a small proportion but is increasing year by year, reflecting its emphasis on Jiangsu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings fluctuating in the 39000-39600 range over the past three years, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 7.1% slightly alleviating competition, but the significant increase of about 45% in Jiangsu Physics Category examinees sharply intensifying competition, along with the university's stable level, steady reputation, and strong disciplinary strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 39620. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 41498, with a range of 40998-41998.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 41498, range 40998-41998. It is recommended that examinees with rankings within 41000 can aim for Tier 1 majors (Biological Sciences base classes, Veterinary Medicine A+, Computer Science) as sprint targets; examinees with rankings between 41000-42000 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering, Horticulture Excellent Program, Animal Science A+, etc.) as main choices, considering graduate school recommendation rates and disciplinary advantages; examinees with rankings above 42000 can prioritize Tier 3 majors (Landscape Architecture, Law, Landscape Architecture, Economics, etc.), while also leveraging the opportunities brought by the university's expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong Agricultural University in Jiangsu's History Category were approximately 5951, 6582, 7783, 7575, and 8106 respectively. Overall, there is a backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1832 places from 2021 to 2023, a slight rebound to 7575 in 2024, and a drop back to 8106 in 2025. In the past three years, it has fluctuated in the 7500-8100 range, with a baseline ranking of about 8106 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu's History Category was 20 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 17 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan is 16 students, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025, a reduction of about 5.9%, and the continuous tightening of enrollment quotas has a certain intensifying effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 45th on the main list, and 47th in 2025, with a stable and slightly rising ranking, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide. In 2026 reputation data, the university did not experience significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 54th, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level. In recent years, there have been no records of admission cutoff line breaks or sharp drops, and the application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine and Animal Husbandry were rated A+, and Crop Science, Aquaculture, and Food Science and Engineering were rated A, with a total of 5 A-level disciplines. Although the History Category enrollment majors are mainly in literature, law, economics, and management, the overall disciplinary strength of the university still attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of applicants for the Jiangsu Provincial College Entrance Examination is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% compared to about 358,000 in 2025. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan City, Hubei Province, relatively close to Jiangsu Province, and is a high-quality 211 university in the central region, with a certain regional appeal to History Category candidates in Jiangsu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation of historical rankings in the 7500-8100 range over the past three years with an overall backward trend, the 5.9% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan intensifying competition, the significant increase of about 45% in the number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu further intensifying competition, and the stable university level and reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 8106.
